caption: In a studio setting with a dark background and purple accent lighting, a man and a woman are seated in wooden chairs facing each other. The man has dark curly hair and a beard, wearing a white long-sleeved button-down shirt and grey trousers. The woman has blonde hair tied back and is wearing a black t-shirt and black pants. Her shirt features the text "HO'S IN YOUR" visible on the front. A white rectangular object sits on a table in front of them. Initially, the man is speaking and gesturing with both hands, while the woman listens with her hands clasped in her lap. As the sequence progresses, the man stops gesturing and rests his hands in his lap, and the woman begins to speak, shifting her hands as she talks. The camera remains in a static wide shot, capturing their interaction throughout the exchange.
